steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search 'unavailable' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with RESERVE action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
